title: Wovirium
description: Adds the new mystical material Wovirium
body:
# Description
Deep in the depths lies ingredients to create the mysticaly powerful material known as Wovirium. This material allows the creation of very powerful weapons including the Wovirium Dagger, Great Ax, and Scepter. These weapons are made from Wovirium which is created much like Netherite except instead of gold and netherite scraps, it is forged from Molten Echo and Lapis. 

## Weapons

### Wovirium Dagger
A quick and simple sword like weapon that does lots of damage and inflicts the opponent with weakness for 5 seconds.

### Wovirium Great Ax
A very slow but high dammage dealing axe like weapon. This weapon also inflicts the opponent with darkness for 5 seconds.

### Wovirium Scepter
A magical staff that although by itself has the stats of a diamond sword, on right click will give the user strength III and speed III for 15 seconds. but also giving them blindness and glowing for 15 seconds. Although no need to fear loosing your target in the dark as when hitting an opponent, they get glowing for 5 seconds that way you can still attack them, even with blindness.

## Tools

### Wovirium Drill
A very fast and strong drill, it has a speed above gold and the power of diamond.




---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


### There is another weapon, but its admin only...
<details>
<summary>For the admins of servers</summary>
  
### The Runein

An op only weapon only obtainable from the /give command. This weapon has nothing too special about its base stats and it has no apparent abilities. But when killing a player, it bans them... Would not recommend giving this item to your players, it would be silly though (:
</details>




Usage
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Yes, You can use this nod in a modpack (Just please put some kind of credit please)

Yes, You can put this mod in a video (Just please put some kind of credit please)

No, You can not Re-distribute this mod on other platforms.
